span.p:
Does the genre demand
near-zero input latency?
(fighters, twitch action)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is the simulation deterministic
(or can it be made so), with
a small player count?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ROLLBACK NETCODE
predict remote input, advance instantly,
re-simulate on misprediction;
needs determinism + bounded rollback window

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Need an authority for
anti-cheat or many players?
